[2021-09-12 14:29] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Just don't click the Pixies if they aren't killing smth ofc

[2021-09-12 14:31] silentslayers: Patty is nice but nothing super OP
[2021-09-12 14:31] silentslayers: Wall is nice but GFab and BP with dynamos is better

[2021-09-12 14:35] silentslayers: I wager it crushes BS+Dynamo+Patroller

[2021-09-12 14:36] silentslayers: I tend to skip blast in Gfab vs Gfab dynamo games
[2021-09-12 14:37] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): So you only get other tech once you're out of green attack?
[2021-09-12 14:37] silentslayers: Yeah. If that happens you bought too many dynamos
[2021-09-12 14:37] silentslayers: Like if it happens badly
[2021-09-12 14:37] silentslayers: If its just like 1 turn of awkward "Do I get a blast" its fine
[2021-09-12 14:37] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): But 4 Dynamos isn't a lot
[2021-09-12 14:37] silentslayers: But if you ran out like super fast you fucked up
[2021-09-12 14:38] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): I thought with Trinity you could overkill
[2021-09-12 14:38] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): By with Dynamo I thought you always get 4
[2021-09-12 14:38] silentslayers: Well in base set + dynamo for example
[2021-09-12 14:38] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Base + dynamo is BP?
[2021-09-12 14:38] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): I would've thought it's blue green
[2021-09-12 14:38] silentslayers: Well if you have to go BP it's wrong at least
[2021-09-12 14:39] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Or even all 3 colors
[2021-09-12 14:39] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Which is kinda misleading cos you prolly don't buy Geese
[2021-09-12 14:39] silentslayers: Just let me put it this way
[2021-09-12 14:39] silentslayers: If you only go for BP
[2021-09-12 14:39] silentslayers: And one person goes 3 trinities
[2021-09-12 14:39] silentslayers: The 3 dynamo will win
[2021-09-12 14:40] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Is it really 3 Dynamos with GFab and 10 Geese though?
[2021-09-12 14:40] silentslayers: But the gfab line means more damage comes out so you probably lose your dynamos fast enough
[2021-09-12 14:40] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Surely 4 Dynamos can buy all that stuff faster?
[2021-09-12 14:40] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): I feel like there isn't enough granularity between 3 and 4 Dyanmos
[2021-09-12 14:40] silentslayers: you just dont want to run out of cannons insanely fast
[2021-09-12 14:41] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Just intuitively I feel 3 is too little, and 4 is prolly "too much" in the sense that you run out of things to buy before it's game over for either side
[2021-09-12 14:42] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Giselle is offline and I can't connect to the game lel
[2021-09-12 14:42] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): So 3 Dynamo is 15GGG per turn
[2021-09-12 14:42] silentslayers: you go for 4 if your dynamos die fast OR you don't run out of BP attackers too quickly
[2021-09-12 14:43] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): 4 Dynamo is 20GGGG per turn
[2021-09-12 14:44] silentslayers: I should just preface this right away that in 90% of dynamo BP games in bs+8/9/10/11 4 dynamos is correct
[2021-09-12 14:44] silentslayers: This is very much an edge case in smaller sets
[2021-09-12 14:45] silentslayers: Eh 90% is maybe a stretch it's actually decently common you need to react and do 3 dynamo builds against asymmetry, but w/e

messages.author: actualg
messages.content: it’s not grindy, there’s no downtime, it just has insane open-ended puzzle dungeons that you unravel over hours, figuring out better ways to optimize and different routes to take, what to get and what to avoid

messages.content: some of the towers have an extreme version of the Final Fantasy X/Path of Exile sphere grid in them

messages.author: actualg
messages.content: the demo is like 20 hours long, highly recommend it

messages.author: actualg
messages.content: i call this game “tnex”, or “the tnexpill”

messages.author: actualg

messages.author: doofmaster
messages.content: I'm enjoying your recommendation. Quite addicting. Prismata is not uglier and has FAR better sound design, but I can see how a game like Tactical Nexus might have more mainstream appeal. Immediately rewarding gameplay that belies complex resource management. Which Prismata shares in my book, but I'm not everyone.
